# Source: dependencies/packages.toml -- run `make gen-deps` to regenerate.

# manager: cargo | layer: 3 | packages: 3

cargo-edit  # provides cargo-add / cargo-rm / cargo-set-version / cargo-upgrade binaries (no cargo-edit binary by upstream design)
cargo-outdated  # provides cargo-add / cargo-rm / cargo-set-version / cargo-upgrade binaries (no cargo-edit binary by upstream design)
topgrade  # multi-package-manager updater; build-time cargo tool (signed prebuilt via cargo-binstall --only-signed)
